summary: Played back the design-only brief for a high-quality DinoBrain Observatory graph redesign based on the provided dinosaur-shaped graph image. No files were changed. Product Design user-context preflight could not run because python/python3 resolves to WindowsApps shim without a local Python runtime, but the supplied image is a concrete visual source.
decisions: Treat this as design-only work: no logic, data model, hook, installer, SQLite, or MCP behavior changes.
Use the supplied image as the visual target: dinosaur silhouette made from existing graph nodes and edges, not a decorative overlay.
Wait for user confirmation before implementation.
next_steps: After confirmation, inspect current Observatory rendering code and CSS, then produce a scoped design plan before editing only visual/rendering code.
